hub.title: Plan of Action Hub
hub.subtitle: Every live interview, one plan each, built before the call

plans.interviewLabel: Thu Jul 23, 2026 · 12:00–1:00 PM EDT · Google Meet
plans.who: Chris Bross (Partner/COO) · Thomas Heed (Co-Founder/President) · Collin (role TBC)
plans.thesis: Indiana's insurance and home-services M&A wave manufactures EverEffect's exact problem on a predictable clock — a merger fragments digital presence, and that is a Local SEO, GBP and web-design engagement arriving on a known date.

plans.who: Hayley (HR) · introduction routed through a mutual contact
plans.thesis: FusionAuth has the product devs want and the competitive wedge that closes. What is missing is the operating system that turns 20M+ downloads and a freemium base into predictable, qualified pipeline.
